update_task_status:missing_confidence.error_pattern: TaskManager.update_task_status() got an unexpected keyword argument 'confidence'

observations: Baseline portfolio daily VaR (99%): 2.43%, ES: 2.78%, volatility: 16.6%.
Top 5 risk contributors by volatility CTR%: PPC (10.1%), ODD (7.5%), JJSF (6.7%), VITL (6.6%), SEB (6.6%).
Highest single-name tail risk by CTR% (VaR): CASY (21.4%)—significant outlier; others: CELH (7.4%), IPAR (6.9%), DOLE (6.9%), KVUE (6.4%).
CASY exhibits >20% tail-risk: single-name concentration risk identified—even though volatility CTR% appears diversified. No other positions >11%.

args.reason: Recorded baseline risk metrics. Flagged CASY for outsized tail-risk contribution. Other positions within moderate risk range.

occurrences.full_error: TaskManager.update_task_status() got an unexpected keyword argument 'confidence'

observations: Initial portfolio max drawdown: -10.9% is within moderately acceptable range, but multiple episodes approach -6% to -7% in single streaks.
Average drawdown: -1.79% and Ulcer Index: 2.7% are moderate, but frequent 20+ day recovery periods (up to 89 days) reflect some resilience issues under stress and slow regains post-loss.
Current drawdown is -6.1% active, representing some ongoing portfolio volatility risk.
Largest drawdowns occurred over summer and early autumn, indicating seasonality and potential systemic portfolio vulnerabilities.

correct_args.reason: Drawdown profile shows moderate downside risk, with generally acceptable recovery times, but some lengthy and severe events to address in iteration.

args.title: portfolio_v2
args.event: Portfolio V2 portfolio_dict and rationale (changes from V1) logged per execution protocol. V2 rebalances for value tilt, lower intra-industry correlation, more beverage/household/personal care diversification. Allocations: {"KR":{"allocation":0.06,"position":"long"},"CAG":{"allocation":0.055,"position":"long"},"POST":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"long"},"BJ":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"long"},"PG":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"long"},"CL":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"long"},"MNST":{"allocation":0.05,"position":"long"},"KO":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"long"},"COST":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"long"},"KMB":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"long"},"ENR":{"allocation":0.05,"position":"long"},"ODD":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"long"},"ELF":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"long"},"EPC":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"long"},"CCEP":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"long"},"TAP":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"long"},"HLF":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"long"},"WBA":{"allocation":0.055,"position":"short"},"UNFI":{"allocation":0.055,"position":"short"},"SJM":{"allocation":0.05,"position":"short"},"PRMB":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"short"},"HSY":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"short"},"STZ":{"allocation":0.045,"position":"short"},"TGT":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"short"},"ADM":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"short"},"SAM":{"allocation":0.04,"position":"short"},"OLPX":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"short"},"EL":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"short"},"SPB":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"short"},"CLX":{"allocation":0.035,"position":"short"}}. Rationale: See prior evidence; trims household/food clusters, reallocates to select value/momentum/quality longs (ENR, TAP, ODD, EPC, ELF), increases beverage/personal care weighting, all constraints met.
args.context: Rebalancing versus V1: trims PG, KMB, GIS, POST; boosts ENR, TAP, ODD, EPC, ELF. Diversification and value tilt improved; all hard constraints met. Ready for analytics suite.
